label: 1232a Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 92–178, title IV, § 401(g)(7)(A)85 Stat. 534Dec. 10, 1971
notes: Section, , , , related to Federal manufacturers excise tax on labels and provided for violations and penalties. It was not a part of the Automobile Information Disclosure Act, which comprises this chapter generally.Pub. L. 91–614, title III, § 30484 Stat. 1845Dec. 31, 1970

Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that:Pub. L. 92–178, title IV, § 401(g)(7)(B)85 Stat. 534Dec. 10, 1971“Subparagraph (A) [repealing this section] shall apply to acts (or failures to act) after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Dec. 10, 1971
